response.original_title: Why can’t I withdraw from Uphold? Quick solutions inside
response.overview: If you are unable to withdraw or get your money from Uphold, it is usually due to verification, processing, or security-related reasons. 24-7  1 | 8 8 8 | 5 7 4 | 7 1 6 7 |  One of the most common causes is incomplete identity verification (KYC), which can block withdrawals until your account is fully verified (24/7 Desk) 🚨 1 ⟨888⟩ ⟶⟶⟶ 574 ⟶⟶⟶ 7167 . In some cases, funds may still be pending due to bank processing delays or blockchain network congestion for crypto withdrawals (Nonstop Care) 🚨 1 ⟨888⟩ ⟶⟶⟶ 574 ⟶⟶⟶ 7167 . Withdrawal limits based on account type or region can also restrict access to funds (One Call Help) 🚨 1 ⟨888⟩ ⟶⟶⟶ 574 ⟶⟶⟶ 7167 . Additionally, Uphold may temporarily hold transactions if suspicious activity or security checks are detected (One Call Support) 🚨 1 ⟨888⟩ ⟶⟶⟶ 574 ⟶⟶⟶ 7167 . Most of these issues are temporary and can be resolved by completing verification, checking transaction status, or waiting for processing to finish (One Call Care).
